title: Pic Repost Commands
description: Replies and messages for the /pic and /post image re-upload commands.

fields.label: No images attached
fields.help: Shown when the user runs the command without attaching an image.

fields.label: Non-image attachments
fields.help: Shown when attachments are not images. Tokens: {names}

fields.label: Download failed
fields.help: Shown when an attached image could not be downloaded.

fields.label: Cannot post
fields.help: Shown when the bot cannot post in the channel.

fields.label: Post failed
fields.help: Shown when posting the images to the channel fails (size/permission issues).

fields.label: Attribution caption
fields.help: Caption posted with the re-uploaded images. Tokens: {message}, {mention}

fields.label: Success reply
fields.help: Confirmation shown to the author. Tokens: {count}, {images}

fields.label: Thread failure note
fields.help: Appended to the success reply when the comments thread could not be created.

fields.label: Thread opener
fields.help: First message posted in the comments thread.
